prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT2260S turbocharger** (hybridized with billet compressor wheel) for the **M282 DE14 AL** 1.4L turbocharged inline-3 engine, pushing boost from 1.4 bar to 2.2 bar with a custom **BorgWarner EMP3** wastegate actuator for precise control, paired with a **Forge Motorsport** silicone charge pipe kit (reinforced with 4-ply aramid) to eliminate stock plastic failure points under increased pressure.

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management system with **Bosch Motorsport 0280158800** high-flow injectors (1,200cc/min) and a **Continental EMS2** flex-fuel sensor, enabling E85 compatibility and a custom **APR Carbon Fiber Intake System** with a **K&N XStream** dry filter for optimized airflow to the **M282’s** integrated exhaust manifold.

Bespoke **PWR Australia** front-mount intercooler (FMIC) with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller and a **Tial MV-R 50mm** blow-off valve, paired with a **Milltek Sport** 3.5-inch cat-back exhaust system (304 stainless steel, resonated) and a **RaceChip XLR** piggyback tuner for fine-tuning ignition timing and fuel maps to prevent knock on the **M282’s** 10.5:1 compression ratio.
estetica: **RML Short Wheelbase (SWB) Conversion Kit** with custom **BBS CI-R** 20-inch forged wheels (9.5J ET30 front, 10.5J ET35 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (245/30 R20 front, 275/25 R20 rear), paired with **AP Racing CP9660** 380mm front brake discs and **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers** (painted BRABUS Green).

**Liberty Walk LB Works** widebody kit (carbon fiber, pre-preg autoclave construction) with a **Seibon Carbon** hood (dual heat extractors) and **Varis Japan** front lip spoiler, complemented by a **BRABUS Shadow Line** LED headlight upgrade (adaptive matrix, 5,000-lumen output) and **Oracle Lighting** RGB underglow with **Philips Ultinon Pro9000** fog lights.

**Recaro Pole Position** carbon-Kevlar bucket seats (HANS-compatible, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with **Schroth Profi II-6** 6-point harnesses, paired with a **Sparco Pro 2000** steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release) and a **Defi BF** digital gauge cluster (boost, oil temp, AFR) mounted in a **Custom Cages** bolt-in roll bar (T45 steel, powder-coated BRABUS Silver).
